ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game (e.g., Overwatch) */,
  "game_settings" TEXT /* Settings of the game (e.g., game mode, rules) */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "popular_maps" TEXT /* JSON array of popular maps for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Philadelphia Fusion) */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team (e.g., PHI) */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* JSON array of social media handles */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home base */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player (e.g., John Doe) */,
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., attacker, defender) */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* JSON array of social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., open match, playoff match) */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the match was played in */,
  "match_start_time" TEXT /* Time the match started */,
  "match_end_time" TEXT /* Time the match ended */,
  "match_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match */,
  "match_location" TEXT /* Location where the match was played */,
  "match_audience" INTEGER /* Number of viewers for the match */,
  "match_replay_url" TEXT /* URL to the match replay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the score belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that scored */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "score_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the score was recorded */,
  "score_difference" INTEGER /* Difference in score between the two teams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., game mode) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was applied */,
  "setting_duration" TEXT /* Duration the setting was active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_settings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the stage belongs to */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "stage_description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "stage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the stage */,
  "stage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the stage */,
  "stage_type" TEXT /* Type of stage (e.g., group stage, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the map belongs to */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "map_description" TEXT /* Description of the map */,
  "map_size" TEXT /* Size of the map */,
  "map_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the map */,
  "map_designer" TEXT /* Designer of the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the game mode belongs to */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "game_mode_description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "game_mode_popularity" TEXT /* Popularity of the game mode */,
  "game_mode_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., kills, deaths) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistic was recorded */,
  "stat_game" TEXT /* Game the statistic is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., wins, losses) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistic was recorded */,
  "stat_game" TEXT /* Game the statistic is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the leaderboard belongs to */,
  "leaderboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of leaderboard (e.g., overall, seasonal) */,
  "leaderboard_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaderboard the rank belongs to */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank (e.g., 1st, 2nd) */,
  "rank_description" TEXT /* Description of the rank */,
  "rank_points" INTEGER /* Points required to achieve the rank */,
  "rank_icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaderboard the ranking belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being ranked */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rank the team is being ranked at */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date the ranking was recorded */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous period */,
  "rank_points" INTEGER /* Points the team has in this rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("rank_id") REFERENCES ranks ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
